name: bottel-social
description: Standalone social CLI app built with cli-app-scaffold

scripts.predev: for pkg in react ink ink-text-input; do rm -rf ../../packages/cli-app-scaffold/node_modules/$pkg && ln -sf $(pwd)/node_modules/$pkg ../../packages/cli-app-scaffold/node_modules/$pkg; done && rm -rf ../../packages/cli-app-scaffold/node_modules/@types/react && ln -sf $(pwd)/node_modules/@types/react ../../packages/cli-app-scaffold/node_modules/@types/react
